heuristics.condition: All Text Style = Left → Same parent
heuristics.final_label: Alignment: Left | Non-text → Left extreme X-axis | Text → Align left (design settings)

heuristics.condition: All Text Style = Center → Same parent
heuristics.final_label: Alignment: Center | Non-text → Center point X-axis | Text → Align center (design settings)

heuristics.condition: All Text Style = Right → Same parent
heuristics.final_label: Alignment: Right | Non-text → Right extreme X-axis | Text → Align right (design settings)

heuristics.condition: Text Style = Mixed (text elements > 3) → Same parent
heuristics.final_label: Alignment: Center | Non-text → Center point X-axis | Text → Align center (design settings)

heuristics.final_label: Width: Keep Size | Height: Keep Size

heuristics.condition: Any Parent → Blank → Width: Any, Height: 0–199px
Any Parent → Blank → Width: Any, Height: 200px+
Parent is Section → Width: Any, Height: Any
Direct Parent: Box → Element is First
Direct Parent: Box → Element is Last
Direct Parent: Section → Element is First
Direct Parent: Section → Element is Last

heuristics.final_label: Margin Left: 20px | Margin Right: 20px | Align: Left

heuristics.final_label: Position: Next available inward adjacent row | Align: Center

heuristics.final_label: Hamburger: Margin Left 20px | Others: Next row, Align: Center

heuristics.final_label: Logo: Margin Left 20px | Hamburger: Margin Right 20px

heuristics.final_label: 1st: Margin Left 20px, Align Left | 2nd: Margin Right 20px, Align Right

heuristics.condition: Group 1 (Expand/Top Right/Anchor Right/Abs Left) → H-Axis → 0 Type
Parent is Section → Width = parent width

header_heuristics.final_label: Preserve on mobile — don't wrap rows into columns
Cell is the most left side

header_heuristics.condition: Cell contains Menu / Cart / Search → Language LTR
header_heuristics.final_label: Cell is the most right side

header_heuristics.condition: Child is logo → Language LTR → Header padding = 0px
Cell contains Menu / Cart → Language LTR → Header padding = 0px

header_heuristics.final_label: Section padding is 24px in mobile (each edge separately)
Width is equal on all cells
Elements are vertically aligned to center
Treat as generic section — apply standard section heuristics
